name: 🌐 Global View
description: Full Twitter/X system overview with all components and connections

name: 📢 Tweet Fanout
description: How a single tweet reaches millions of follower timelines using the hybrid push/pull strategy

steps.description: User composes tweet — request flows through LB to API service
Tweet service validates content and assigns a Snowflake ID
Tweet is persisted to the durable Tweet Store
Tweet created event is published to Kafka event bus
Fanout service consumes event, queries Social Graph for follower list
For normal users: tweet ID pushed to each follower's Redis timeline cache
When a follower opens their timeline: Timeline service reads from Redis, merges celebrity tweets, applies ML ranking
Timeline service hydrates tweet IDs into full content from Tweet Store

name: 📈 Trending Topics
description: How trending topics are detected and served from real-time event streams

steps.description: Every tweet creation event streams into Kafka with hashtags and content metadata
Stream processing pipeline analyzes real-time hashtag velocity and engagement spikes
Trending topics are computed using sliding window aggregation and anomaly detection
Client requests trending data through API, results personalized by location and interests
